items.briefing:
Microsoft has released a record-breaking Patch Tuesday update fixing 206 security vulnerabilities — the largest ever in a single month. Australian organisations using Windows and other Microsoft products should prioritise applying these updates as soon as possible. Separately, ServiceNow has disclosed a security incident that exposed customer data, so if your organisation uses ServiceNow, check for any communications from them about your account.

Phishing continues to be a significant burden, with new research highlighting the growing time and cost it takes staff to handle malicious emails. **Practical tip:** Enable automatic updates on all Microsoft software so critical security patches are applied without delay.

featured.title: ServiceNow discloses security incident exposing customer data - BleepingComputer
featured.quote: ServiceNow breach could expose Australian enterprises relying on critical IT service management platform.
